title: RESM: Capturing sequence and structure encoding of RNAs by mapped transfer learning from evolution-scale-modeling protein language model.
author: Zhang, Yikun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the dataset and checkpoints for RESM (RNA Evolution-Scale Modeling), a state-of-the-art RNA language model that leverages protein language model knowledge to overcome RNA's inherent challenges. By mapping RNA sequences to pseudo-protein representations and adapting the ESM2 protein language model, RESM provides a robust foundation for deciphering RNA sequence-structure-function relationships, with broad implications for RNA biology.
steps_raw: This repository contains the dataset and checkpoints for RESM (RNA Evolution-Scale Modeling), a state-of-the-art RNA language model that leverages protein language model knowledge to overcome RNA's inherent challenges. By mapping RNA sequences to pseudo-protein representations and adapting the ESM2 protein language model, RESM provides a robust foundation for deciphering RNA sequence-structure-function relationships, with broad implications for RNA biology.
